title: Comedy Circus Ke Tansen
desc: Renowned personalities team up with talented stand-up comedians to put on hilarious performances, aiming to impress the judges.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Manmohan is a businessman with a traditional wife. Narayan is jobless with a modern wife. Both try impressing each other's spouses, creating hilarious chaos, lies, and comic situations.

title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
desc: Happu Singh is a lovable policeman juggling a chaotic home life and quirky colleagues. Misunderstandings, silly antics, and laughter follow him everywhere-at work, at home, and beyond.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Tiwari fakes a marriage with Anita to protect the haveli, while Vibhuti pretends with Angoori. Their plan collapses when Gayatri Devi awakens and Vidya Bhabhi's ghost traps them in Ghungatganj.

title: Gharwali Pedwali
desc: Jeetu gets angry at Lattu for troubling him. Later, Lattu causes Jeetu to get upset and lose his temper while trying to help Ramesh and Suresh.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan accuses Vibhuti of stealing Angoori's ring, leading to misunderstandings and a comical retrieval attempt, while Vibhuti's soap purchase disappoints both men.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti pretends to be from a farming family to impress Angoori, tilling his garden and inviting Tika and Malkhan to join, which angers Anita but impresses Angoori.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: A misunderstanding lands Tiwari in trouble, while Anita throws Vibhuti out, leading him to seek shelter with Angoori; later Ammaji informs Angoori about a Vedic remedy Tiwari needs to perform.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita alleges that Vibhuti is pretending to be a farmer to avoid a trip to Meerut. Later, Vibhuti secretly plants ten kilograms of market-bought tomatoes in the garden at night.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti's farming angers Anita and neighbors, but the Commissioner supports him while he refuses to share his secret formula which attracts media attention and a Chinese spy.
